strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience spanning Node.js, TypeScript, and React
Current role involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, matching the AI agent requirement
Strong testing/TDD background with workshops, Selenium courses, and a custom D test runner
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Limited evidence of Kotlin; Java experience is dated (robotic arms work 2016-2018)
No mention of Vitest specifically, nor recent PostgreSQL work (primarily MongoDB)
response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned senior/staff engineer with well over the 6+ years required, strong TypeScript/Node/React fundamentals, and directly relevant current work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators. Testing culture is a clear strength. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience, dated Java/Kotlin exposure, and database experience leaning toward MongoDB over PostgreSQL — but these are learnable for an engineer of this caliber.
